raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Assembly Budget Committee approved $17.5 million for CalFood, a hunger prevention proposal.",
    "The $17.5 million approved by the committee will allow hunger prevention organizations to deliver nearly 87.5 million meals a year.",
    "Fresno is the 5th hungriest city in America.",
    "The Community Food Bank of Fresno provides food to more than 200 agencies in Fresno, Madera, Kings, Kern and Tulare Counties.",
    "The Community Food Bank serves over 280,000 people each month.",
    "Nearly 1 in 8 residents in the Central Valley needs emergency food assistance.",
    "The Community Food Bank can leverage an incredible 7 meals for every dollar invested into the program.",
    "The funds must be used for foods grown in California, benefiting the Valley’s agricultural sector.",
    "The program reaches all 58 counties in California, enabling each county to purchase foods according to its needs."
  ]
}
```
